name: ExtensionExampleScenario_Instance_StructureVersion
title: R5: E.g. 4.0.1 (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ExampleScenario.instance.structureVersion` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ExampleScenario.instance.structureVersion` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ExampleScenario.instance.structureVersion` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ExampleScenario.instance.structureVersion` has a context of ExampleScenario.instance based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ExampleScenario`.
Element `ExampleScenario.instance.structureVersion` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:

element.definition: Conveys the version of the data structure instantiated.  I.e. what release of FHIR, X12, OpenEHR, etc. is instance compliant with.
